plan_upgrade.subject: Welcome to {planName}, {firstName}!
plan_upgrade.heading: Hi {firstName}, welcome to {planName}!
plan_upgrade.body: We're thrilled you've upgraded. Here's what just switched on for you:
plan_upgrade.closing: If anything about {planName} isn't working the way you need it to, just reply to this email — I'll personally make sure it's sorted.

pos_welcome.subject: Welcome to AskBiz POS, {firstName}!
pos_welcome.heading: Hi {firstName}, welcome to AskBiz POS!
pos_welcome.body1: We're thrilled you've added AskBiz POS — welcome to the family.
pos_welcome.body2: Your till, your stock tracker, and your end-of-day report are live now, right alongside the rest of your AskBiz account.
pos_welcome.closing: If anything isn't working the way you need it to, just reply to this email — I'll personally make sure it's sorted.
